parameters.description: E. coli strains carrying the T7 RNA polymerase required for pET-based IPTG induction.

citations.title: Recombinant protein expression in Escherichia coli: advances and challenges
citations.tier_justification: Peer-reviewed review establishing BL21(DE3) and its derivatives as canonical T7 expression hosts.

parameters.description: Canonical IPTG induction concentration for pET / T7 systems in BL21(DE3).

citations.title: Recombinant protein expression in Escherichia coli: advances and challenges
citations.tier_justification: Rosano 2014 establishes 0.1 - 1 mM IPTG as the canonical induction range; 1 mM is the standard textbook value.

parameters.description: Acceptable IPTG induction concentration range before yield falls off.

citations.title: Recombinant protein expression in Escherichia coli: advances and challenges
citations.tier_justification: Rosano 2014 defines 0.1-1 mM as the typical IPTG induction range.

parameters.description: Acceptable OD600 window for IPTG induction of exponentially growing BL21(DE3).

citations.title: Recombinant protein expression in Escherichia coli: advances and challenges
citations.tier_justification: Rosano 2014 recommends inducing at mid-log phase, OD600 ~ 0.4 - 0.8.

parameters.description: Induction temperatures accepted for recombinant protein expression.

citations.title: Recombinant protein expression in Escherichia coli: advances and challenges
citations.tier_justification: Rosano 2014: 37 C short induction and 18-25 C overnight induction are both standard; low temperature improves solubility of hard-to-fold proteins.

parameters.description: Acceptable lysis buffer pH range for His-tagged protein lysis.

citations.title: QIAGEN QIAexpressionist Handbook (5th ed.)
citations.tier_justification: QIAGEN QIAexpressionist handbook recommends pH 7.0-8.0 for Ni-NTA-compatible lysis buffers.

parameters.description: Benign model protein used for the Express-01 scenario.

citations.title: NEB pMAL Protein Fusion and Purification System
citations.tier_justification: NEB pMAL product page supporting MBP fusions as a standard benign expression target; GFP is used as the reporter fusion partner.

parameters.description: Expected molecular weight of the MBP-GFP benign fusion.

citations.title: NEB pMAL Protein Fusion and Purification System
citations.tier_justification: MBP ~ 42.5 kDa + GFP ~ 27 kDa + linker ~ 2 kDa = ~ 72 kDa for the MBP-GFP fusion per NEB pMAL product.

parameters.description: Expected soluble yield of the MBP-GFP fusion under optimal BL21(DE3) induction conditions.

citations.title: Recombinant protein expression in Escherichia coli: advances and challenges
citations.tier_justification: Rosano 2014 reports MBP fusions routinely express at tens of mg/L in BL21(DE3); 40 mg/L is a conservative optimal value.
